heading: Price support levels for other nonbasic agricultural commodities
label: 1447 Price support levels for other nonbasic agricultural commodities
text: The Secretary is authorized to make available through loans, purchases, or other operations price support to producers for any nonbasic agricultural commodity not designated in sections 1446, 1446a, and 1446d of this title at a level not in excess of 90 per centum of the parity price for the commodity.1See References in Text note below.1
notes: References in Text, referred to in text, was omitted from the Code.Section 1446d of this title

Amendments1977— temporarily inserted provisions authorizing Secretary to make price support available for the 1978 through 1981 crops of flaxseed, dry edible beans, gum naval stores, and, in the case of the 1979 through 1981 crops, sugar beets and sugar cane, and for other nonbasic undesignated commodities. See Effective and Termination Dates of 1977 Amendment note below.Pub. L. 95–113

Effective and Termination Dates of 1977 Amendment, , , provided that the amendment made by section 1003(a) is effective only with respect to the 1978 through 1981 crops.Pub. L. 95–113, title X, § 1003(a)91 Stat. 950Sept. 29, 1977
